features: SALON-QUALITY RESULTS: Powerful performance delivers a fast dry and effortless styling with every blow dry
FLAWLESS FINISH ON THE GO: Lightweight design makes it a perfect companion on your travels, ensuring you can enhance your look wherever you go
DEFINE YOUR LOOK: Concentrator nozzle tool included for precise styling, directing airflow to sectioned hair for voluminous hair
LONG-LASTING STYLE: 3 heat and 2 speed settings suitable for all types of hair, including a cool shot function to set your style in place for a long-lasting blow dry
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Professional Carmen quality with a standard 1-year manufacturer’s guarantee and a 2-year extension, subject to product registration online
description: Product Description For a powerful performance on the go, use Carmen’s Twilight lightweight hair dryer that gives you salon quality smoothness with no nonsense. Its small but might body is ideal for stress-free styling that’s travel sized for glorious looks wherever you venture. You can tailor the hair dryer’s intensity to suit your needs from the three heat and two speed settings with an additional cool shot function to define your look for long-lasting effects. To achieve volume and texture, attach the concentrator nozzle to target precise areas which can also reduce frizz. To maintain the performance, the removable filter allows you to remove any debris or loose hairs so you can feel reassured you will get salon, professional hairstyles every time you use it. Safety Warning Do not rinse or submerge in water. Keep the power plug and cord away from heated surfaces. Do not use while bathing. Box Contains 1xhair dryer, 1xmanual See more
